# SmartMove.co.ke

> Find a home, order services. Verified professionals, transparent prices, 100% money back guarantee. Nairobi's #1 moving and home services platform.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://smartmove.co.ke/): Find homes, book movers, cleaners, electricians, plumbers, and home services in Nairobi
- [Blog](https://smartmove.co.ke/blog/): Moving tips, neighborhood guides, cost-saving advice for Nairobi residents

## Popular Services

- [Moving Help](https://smartmove.co.ke/): 2 movers with truck for 4 hours — KSh 4,500
- [Window Washing](https://smartmove.co.ke/): Professional window cleaning for 2-bedroom apartment — KSh 3,500
- [Move-out Cleaning](https://smartmove.co.ke/): Deep cleaning for 2-3 bedroom apartment — KSh 5,500
- [Home Maintenance](https://smartmove.co.ke/): Handyman service for doors, cabinets, shelves — KSh 3,500
- [Electrician](https://smartmove.co.ke/): Repairs, installations, safety inspections — KSh 2,500
- [Plumber](https://smartmove.co.ke/): Leaky faucets, burst pipes, installations — KSh 2,500

## Moving Packages

- [Starter Package](https://smartmove.co.ke/): KSh 15,000 — Movers + technician + basic cleaning + bed
- [Studio/1-Bed Package](https://smartmove.co.ke/): KSh 25,000 — Full day movers + electrician + plumber + furniture
- [Family Package](https://smartmove.co.ke/): KSh 35,000 — 2 trucks + furniture for 4 rooms + deep cleaning + deposit loan
- [Executive Package](https://smartmove.co.ke/): KSh 55,000 — Premium movers + designer furniture + smart home setup

## Essential Blog Posts

- [Best Family-Friendly Neighborhoods in Nairobi](https://smartmove.co.ke/blog/best-family-friendly-neighborhoods-in-nairobi-kilimani-karen-westlands-more/): Compare Kilimani, Karen, Westlands, Lavington, Kileleshwa, Runda for schools, safety, rent
- [Hidden Moving Costs in Nairobi](https://smartmove.co.ke/blog/hidden-moving-costs-in-nairobi-avoid-these-7-budget-traps/): Avoid 7 budget traps and save KSh 15,000+
- [Complete Nairobi Moving Checklist](https://smartmove.co.ke/blog/the-complete-nairobi-moving-checklist-from-deposit-loan-to-deep-cleaning/): From deposit loan to deep cleaning
- [How to Save KSh 25,000 When Moving to Nairobi](https://smartmove.co.ke/blog/how-to-save-ksh-25000-when-moving-to-nairobi-bundles-referrals-loans/): Bundles, referrals, and loans
- [Ultimate Guide to End of Tenancy Cleaning](https://smartmove.co.ke/blog/ultimate-guide-to-end-of-tenancy-cleaning-in-nairobi-get-your-deposit-back/): Get your deposit back

- [35% Tax Deduction on Home Services in Kenya](https://smartmove.co.ke/blog/35-tax-deduction-on-home-services-in-kenya-what-you-can-claim/): What you can claim
- [How to Vet Professionals in Nairobi](https://smartmove.co.ke/blog/movers-plumbers-electricians-how-to-vet-professionals-in-nairobi/): Movers, plumbers, electricians

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:business@haofinder.com): business@haofinder.com — Response within 4 hours
- [Phone/WhatsApp](tel:+254715560734): +254 715 560 734 — Urgent inquiries
- [WhatsApp Chat](https://wa.me/254715560734): Fastest response

## Business Hours

- Monday–Friday: 8 AM – 6 PM
- Saturday: 9 AM – 4 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Location

Nairobi, Kenya — Online support only
